application_credentials.description: Create a SmartThings OAuth-In App with the SmartThings CLI. Add this redirect URI exactly: `{redirect_uri}`. Use scopes `r:devices:*`, `x:devices:*`, and `r:locations:*`, then enter the generated client ID and client secret here. [SmartThings CLI documentation]({console_url})

user.description: Connect your Samsung account with SmartThings OAuth. Add SmartThings application credentials first if Home Assistant asks for them.
user.title: Connect SmartThings

device.description: Select the SmartThings soundbar to add to Home Assistant.
device.title: Select soundbar

reauth_confirm.description: Reconnect SmartThings with OAuth. This is required when the refresh token was revoked, expired, or the legacy Personal Access Token entry needs to be replaced.
reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate SmartThings

data.settings_advanced_audio: Enable 'Advanced Audio switches' capabilities (NightMode, BassMode, VoiceEnhancer)

reconfigure_confirm.description: Some soundbars have a different featureset than others. Please the features supported by your soundbar (visible in the SmartThings App).
reconfigure_confirm.title: Device Settings

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to SmartThings. Try again later.
abort.missing_configuration: SmartThings application credentials are not configured.
abort.missing_scopes: SmartThings did not grant all required scopes.
abort.no_devices: No SmartThings devices were returned for this account.
abort.oauth_error: SmartThings OAuth flow did not return valid data.
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: The selected SmartThings account does not match this soundbar entry.
abort.reauth_device_unavailable: This SmartThings account cannot access the configured soundbar.

data.settings_advanced_audio: Enable Advanced Audio switches (Night Mode, Bass Mode, Voice Amplifier)

init.description: Choose which optional Samsung Soundbar features Home Assistant should expose. Unsupported features may be unavailable on some models.
init.title: Samsung Soundbar options

set_woofer_level.name: Set Subwoofer Level
set_woofer_level.description: Change the volume of your subwoofer.

set_speaker_level.name: Change Speaker Level
set_speaker_level.description: Change the volume of individual speakers.

level.name: Level
level.description: Level of the Speaker from -6 to 6.

set_rear_speaker_mode.name: Set Rear Speaker Mode
set_rear_speaker_mode.description: Use your rear speakers as 'Front' or 'Rear' speakers.

speaker_mode.name: Speaker mode
speaker_mode.description: Weather the speaker are used as rear / front speakers.

dump_execute_payload.name: Dump execute payload
dump_execute_payload.description: Request SmartThings execute hrefs and return the raw payload for diagnostics.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Samsung Soundbar device. Required only when multiple soundbars are loaded.

preset.name: Preset
preset.description: Known SmartThings execute href group to dump. Ignored when href is provided.

write_property.name: Write probe property
write_property.description: Optional explicit write probe property. Requires href and write_value. This may change the soundbar setting.

write_value.name: Write probe value
write_value.description: Optional explicit write probe value. Used only with write_property and href. This may change the soundbar setting.

dump_status_summary.name: Dump status summary
dump_status_summary.description: Return a compact SmartThings status capability summary for diagnostics.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Samsung Soundbar device. Required only when multiple soundbars are loaded.

include_null.name: Include null values
include_null.description: Include capabilities and attributes whose value is null.
